title: SCP-3008, The Infinite Ikea
description: An endless furniture store that traps those who enter.
body:
The Infinite Ikea adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-3008, also known as the Infinite Ikea.


SCP-3008 appears as a regular Ikea building, but entering it teleports the player into an endless interior world filled with rooms resembling areas like living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, bathrooms and gardens. The dimension is flat and enclosed by bedrock, ensuring there’s no escape except through the exit door, if you can find it. When night falls, the lights flicker off and an announcement echoes through the halls as faceless Ikea staff become violently aggressive. To escape, players must find a rare Store Key, sometimes dropped by these creatures during the night.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Why is there no 1.19.2 Version?

There is no 1.19.2 version of SCP-3008 because MCreator works different in lower versions, which means that some features aren't in 1.19.2. Some Features also break if you port them back to 1.19.2.

► Why do I find empty holes in SCP-3008?

Due to the generation of SCP-3008, it can happen rarely that you find an empty hole in the ground.

► Where does SCP-3008 spawn?

SCP-3008 spawns as structure in the overworld in plains, savannas, desert, forests or badlands. There may be multiple SCP-3008s.

</details>



![SCP-3008](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad8e78e655749e98427adaaaf1613b02853b742_0.webp)

SCP-3008 itself is an anomalous spatial structure resembling a normal Ikea store from the outside. Upon entering, players are transported into a separate dimension that extends infinitely in all directions. The interior is filled with repeating furniture displays and various themed areas like bedrooms, living rooms, bathrooms, kitchens, and gardens. The store’s lights follow a day-night cycle, and when night falls, the lights will go out and the Creatures inside turn hostile... The only way out is through another Exit Door by right clicking it with a Store Key.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
